title: 新品铺市追踪
description: 追踪新品铺市进度，分析新品覆盖率与客户活跃度

kpis.label: 新品SKU数
kpis.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT deliv_mat_name) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL AND deliv_mat_name LIKE '%新%'
kpis.help: 本月有提货记录的新品SKU数量（产品名含'新'）

kpis.label: 新品提货量
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),1) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL AND deliv_mat_name LIKE '%新%'

kpis.label: 新品客户数
kpis.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_code) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL AND deliv_mat_name LIKE '%新%'
kpis.help: 本月提货新品的客户数

kpis.label: 铺市率
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN deliv_mat_name LIKE '%新%' THEN customer_code END)*100.0/NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT customer_code),0),1) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL
kpis.help: 提货新品的客户数占本月全部活跃客户数的比例

stages.title: 新品产品明细
stages.description: 各新品SKU的提货量与客户数
stages.sql: SELECT deliv_mat_name as 产品, deliv_prodctnline_descrptn as 产线, ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),1) as 提货量_吨, COUNT(DISTINCT customer_code) as 客户数, COUNT(DISTINCT brnch_code) as 覆盖分公司数 FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL AND deliv_mat_name LIKE '%新%' GROUP BY deliv_mat_name, deliv_prodctnline_descrptn ORDER BY 提货量_吨 DESC
stages.insight_focus: 哪些新品提货量领先？哪些新品覆盖面更广？

stages.title: 新品分公司覆盖
stages.description: 各分公司的新品铺市情况
stages.sql: SELECT brnch_descrptn as 分公司, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN deliv_mat_name LIKE '%新%' THEN deliv_mat_name END) as 新品SKU数, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN deliv_mat_name LIKE '%新%' THEN deliv_qty_mt ELSE 0 END),1) as 新品提货量_吨, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN deliv_mat_name LIKE '%新%' THEN customer_code END) as 新品客户数, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN deliv_mat_name LIKE '%新%' THEN customer_code END)*100.0/NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT customer_code),0),1) as 铺市率_pct FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL GROUP BY brnch_descrptn ORDER BY 铺市率_pct DESC
stages.insight_focus: 哪些分公司新品铺市率高？哪些分公司还需加大推广？

stages.title: 新品客户活跃度
stages.description: 新品客户的提货频次与量级分布
stages.sql: SELECT customer_descrptn as 客户, brnch_descrptn as 分公司, COUNT(DISTINCT deliv_mat_name) as 新品SKU数, ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),1) as 新品提货量_吨, COUNT(DISTINCT delivnum) as 提货次数 FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL AND deliv_mat_name LIKE '%新%' GROUP BY customer_descrptn, brnch_descrptn ORDER BY 新品提货量_吨 DESC LIMIT 20
stages.insight_focus: 哪些客户是新品推广先锋？客户复购情况如何？

summary_prompt: 根据以上新品铺市追踪数据（产品明细、分公司覆盖、客户活跃度），请以产品管理视角总结：1)新品整体铺市进展，2)铺市率较低的区域，3)建议的2个推广行动项。不超过150字。
